Interface IAlignment

All Superinterfaces:
IAlignmentLimits, IAlignmentProvider
public interface IAlignment extends IAlignmentLimits, IAlignmentProvider

  • Method Details

    • getExtendedFacing

      ExtendedFacing getExtendedFacing()

    • setExtendedFacing

      void setExtendedFacing(ExtendedFacing alignment)
      Set the facing without additional checks. Tools altering facing should use toolSetExtendedFacing(ExtendedFacing) instead.
